heroDescription: PlanMate connects people who want a trip without the stress of organising it, with people who genuinely enjoy building thoughtful travel itineraries.
easyDesc: Just describe the trip you want
personalDesc: Matched to your budget and travel style
trustSimpleDesc: Just say where, when, and what sort of trip you want
trustHumanDesc: Created by people who actually enjoy organising trips
trustFocusedDesc: Focused only on itinerary outsourcing for now
